description: WHERE BETWEEN with two timestamptz parameters for range filtering
name: where_between
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersCreatedBetween
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, name, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at BETWEEN $1 AND $2
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', bio TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
